role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified the absence of linguistic markers (no text visible) and abstained from analysis.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Focused on terrain, vegetation, and atmospheric conditions consistent with the image.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Analyzed plant species (rice, palms) and their regional distribution.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Evaluated infrastructure (poles, road width) and lack of signage.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized cross-domain cues (camera artifacts, fencing style) to distinguish candidates.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified the region and country. The agents adhered strictly to their domains, with the landscape and botanics agents providing the strongest visual evidence (paddy fields, palms) and the meta agent effectively using infrastructure cues to break the tie between Bangladesh and India.

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Descriptions of flat alluvial plains and flooded paddies match the image perfectly.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Identification of rice and palm silhouettes is visually supported.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Observations about concrete poles and lack of markings are accurate.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Descriptions of fencing and pole styles align with the visual evidence.
